# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: install.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: IstioOperator
metadata:
  name: istio-config-with-envoy-admin
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  meshConfig:
    # Enable access logging for debugging
    accessLogFile: /dev/stdout
    accessLogEncoding: JSON
    # Default proxy configuration for all sidecars
    defaultConfig:
      # Set the Envoy admin port to 15000
      proxyAdminPort: 15000
      # Enable debug-level logging for troubleshooting
      concurrency: 2
      # Hold application start until proxy is ready
      holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts: true
  components:
    pilot:
      k8s:
        env:
          # Allow reading Envoy admin endpoints
          - name: PILOT_ENABLE_DEBUG_IETF_STATUS_CODES
            value: "true"
  values:
    global:
      proxy:
        # Enable privileged mode to allow admin access
        privileged: false
        # Set admin port
        adminPort: 15000
---
# ProxyConfig to ensure admin interface is enabled on all sidecars
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ProxyConfig
metadata:
  name: envoy-admin-access
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  concurrency: 2
  environmentVariables:
    # Enable full admin interface
    ISTIO_ENABLE_ADMIN: "true"
---
# EnvoyFilter to expose admin endpoints for debugging
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: EnvoyFilter
metadata:
  name: envoy-admin-endpoints
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  configPatches:
    # Expose /config_dump endpoint via a listener for debugging
    - applyTo: LISTENER
      match:
        context: SIDECAR_INBOUND
      patch:
        operation: ADD
        value:
          name: envoy_admin_debug_listener
          address:
            socket_address:
              address: 0.0.0.0
              port_value: 15100
          filter_chains:
            - filters:
                - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
                  typed_config:
                    "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
                    stat_prefix: admin_debug
                    codec_type: AUTO
                    route_config:
                      name: local_route
                      virtual_hosts:
                        - name: admin_debug
                          domains:
                            - "*"
                          routes:
                            # Route for /config_dump
                            - match:
                                prefix: /config_dump
                              route:
                                cluster: envoy_admin
                            # Route for /stats
                            - match:
                                prefix: /stats
                              route:
                                cluster: envoy_admin
                            # Route for /clusters
                            - match:
                                prefix: /clusters
                              route:
                                cluster: envoy_admin
                            # Route for /listeners
                            - match:
                                prefix: /listeners
                              route:
                                cluster: envoy_admin
                            # Route for /ready
                            - match:
                                prefix: /ready
                              route:
                                cluster: envoy_admin
                            # Route for /server_info
                            - match:
                                prefix: /server_info
                              route:
                                cluster: envoy_admin
                    http_filters:
                      - name: envoy.filters.http.router
                        typed_config:
                          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router
    # Add an internal cluster pointing to the Envoy admin interface at 127.0.0.1:15000
    - applyTo: CLUSTER
      match:
        context: SIDECAR_INBOUND
      patch:
        operation: ADD
        value:
          name: envoy_admin
          type: STATIC
          connect_timeout: 5s
          load_assignment:
            cluster_name: envoy_admin
            endpoints:
              - lb_endpoints:
                  - endpoint:
                      address:
                        socket_address:
                          address: 127.0.0.1
                          port_value: 15000
---
# Sidecar resource to ensure admin port annotations are set mesh-wide
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: default-sidecar-with-admin
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  # Apply to all workloads in all namespaces
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "./*"
        - "istio-system/*"
---
# Service to expose debug endpoints for easy access via kubectl port-forward
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: envoy-admin-debug
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: envoy-admin-debug
    purpose: troubleshooting
spec:
  ports:
    - name: envoy-admin
      port: 15000
      targetPort: 15000
      protocol: TCP
    - name: envoy-debug-endpoints
      port: 15100
      targetPort: 15100
      protocol: TCP
  selector: {}
---
# NetworkPolicy to restrict admin interface access for production safety
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: restrict-envoy-admin-access
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
  ingress:
    # Allow admin port access only from within the cluster (pods in istio-system)
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: istio-system
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 15000
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 15100
    # Allow access from monitoring namespace for metrics scraping
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: monitoring
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 15000
